channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Iranian fishermen struggle to survive amid Hormuz blockade
item.description: The livelihoods of Iranian fishermen have taken a hit amid the US blockade on Iran’s ports in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Scotland fans book 20 school buses for games at ‘inaccessible’ US World Cup
item.description: As ticket prices soar to record levels, fans come to terms with overall cost of following their teams at World Cup.

item.title: European countries and EU summon Russian envoys over threats on Kyiv
item.description: EU spokesperson Anitta Hipper says Russia’s threat to diplomats and foreign citizens is an 'unacceptable escalation'.

item.title: Tehran labels US attacks ‘gross violation’, says it is prepared to respond
item.description: The US says it struck boats and missile sites in Iran, shortly after both sides had indicated progress in peace talks.

item.title: Israel is no longer ‘shooting and crying’
item.description: A settler society rewarded for its violence has stopped pretending to mourn it.

item.title: Hajj pilgrims gather at Mount Arafat under scorching desert sun
item.description: Temperatures near 44°C test worshippers’ endurance as the annual pilgrimage unfolds under the shadow of war.

item.title: ‘Leave Kyiv’: Why Russia’s latest Ukraine threat is a major escalation
item.description: Russia and Ukraine have been at war since February 2022 and have not yet agreed on a peace deal.

item.title: Iran’s president praises military after US strikes
item.description: President Masoud Pezeshkian praised Iran’s military capabilities after the US carried out ‘self-defence’ strikes on Iran

item.title: India, US strike critical minerals deal: What’s in it, why does it matter?
item.description: Agreement is latest US has signed as it seeks to diversify its rare earths supply chain.

item.title: Twitch to politics: Hasan Piker on Gaza and the US right-wing
item.description: Twitch streamer Hasan Piker tackles politics, Gaza, and culture for nearly 3M viewers.

item.title: US Supreme court rejects NFL attempt to move racism case to arbitration
item.description: The league, plus New York Giants, Denver Broncos and Houston Texans, to move case to proceedings controlled by the NFL.

item.title: Do we owe the world children?
item.description: Is having children a choice or responsibility?

item.title: Norway World Cup 2026 preview: Players to watch, group matches, squad list
item.description: Led by superstar forward Erling Haaland, Norway impressed in qualifying to reach their first World Cup since 1998.

item.title: Al Jazeera speaks to Hajj pilgrims about their journey to Mecca
item.description: Pilgrims gather on the Day of Arafah, the spiritual peak of Hajj, retracing the Prophet Muhammad’s final sermon.

item.title: Israel’s occupation of Gaza, Lebanon, Syria extends beyond what maps show
item.description: Findings show Israel holds 1,000sq km of Gaza, Lebanon and Syria under direct military rule.

item.title: Report warns pro-Palestine protesters face legal crackdown: What to know
item.description: Campaigners warn the right to protest is being put under pressure by the arms industry.

item.title: French Open: Medvedev shocked by wildcard Walton in first round
item.description: Former world number one Daniil Medvedev is stunned by Australia's Adam Walton in the opening round at Roland Garros.

item.title: Protester confronts Canadian politician over ‘Gaza complicity’
item.description: Protester confronts Canadian politician over ‘Gaza complicity’

item.title: French Open: Sabalenka storms past Bouzas Maneiro, Gauff also cruises
item.description: Aryna Sabalenka powered into the French Open second round, defying her world number 50 opponent and searing Paris heat.

item.title: Senegal lawmakers elect ousted PM Sonko as new parliament speaker
item.description: Lawmakers reinstate Sonko and elect him speaker with overwhelming support.

item.title: Congolese protesters accuse EU of complicity in DRC violence
item.description: Congolese protesters marched in Brussels to condemn the EU for what they say is complicity in violence in eastern DRC.

item.title: Israeli air attacks kill seven Palestinians in Gaza
item.description: At least five Palestinians killed in Israeli attack on a refugee camp in central Gaza, officials said.

item.title: ‘United’ Spain first as Barcelona top absent Real Madrid in World Cup squad
item.description: Real's absence from Spain's World Cup squad, while Barca dominate picks, explained by coach as 'united nation' first.

item.title: Libyan forces detain Gaza land convoy activists at Sirte checkpoint
item.description: Forces loyal to Libyan commander Khalifa Haftar have detained members of a land convoy trying to bring aid to Gaza.

item.title: Israeli attacks on eastern Lebanon village kill at least 11 people
item.description: Attacks hit the village of Mashghara in the Bekaa Valley late Monday as Israel intensified its assault across Lebanon.
